heading: Jurisdiction of District Courts
label: 1975 Jurisdiction of District Courts
text: The district courts of the United States shall have original jurisdiction of any civil action or claim against the United States founded upon this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 775 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 775 of this title
